jobs.description: Built a Python (FastAPI) backend synchronizing data across LINE, Google Calendar, and Sheets. Implemented OAuth 2.0 with a background scheduler for token management, and deployed the app on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using Docker.

Developed a Django warehouse system with RBAC and LINE Notify, alongside a FastAPI and PyThaiNLP document generator. Configured a simulated production infrastructure on Ubuntu using Docker Compose and Nginx.
Initiated backend development by implementing core functionalities, user authentication, and an RBAC system using Django, with data managed via SQLite.

About.heading: About Me
About.p1: Hello! I am <highlight>Khunnapat Thubphung (Pe)</highlight>, a Computer Engineering graduate (2nd Class Honors) from Naresuan University. I am a passionate problem solver dedicated to building efficient and scalable software.
About.p2: My experience spans end-to-end application development. I have designed robust backend APIs and managed databases using technologies such as <highlight>FastAPI</highlight> and <highlight>PostgreSQL</highlight>, and built responsive mobile interfaces using <highlight>React Native</highlight>. Beyond writing code, I have hands-on experience handling deployments on <highlight>Google Cloud Platform</highlight> using <highlight>Docker</highlight>, and I am highly interested in integrating <highlight>Machine Learning</highlight> models into practical systems to solve real-world problems.
About.p3: I am constantly open to learning and updating my technical stack. Currently, I am diving deep into backend development with <highlight>Golang</highlight>, focusing on <highlight>Clean Architecture</highlight> to ensure my code is both testable and highly maintainable.
About.p4: My goal is to leverage my engineering skills, analytical thinking, and commitment to industry best practices to build products that excel in both system architecture and real-world usability.

items.title: Dog Breed Identification App
items.description: Built a responsive mobile interface using React Native, integrated with an EfficientNet machine learning model to classify dog breeds.

items.title: LINE & Google Calendar Sync System
items.description: Developed a FastAPI backend with automated OAuth 2.0 token management to synchronize data across LINE Chatbot, Google Calendar, and Google Sheets, deployed on GCP via Docker.

items.title: aiHit Company Data Dashboard
items.description: Built a responsive web dashboard using React and Material UI to visualize and manage a dataset of 10,000 UK companies, integrated with a FastAPI and SQLite backend.

items.title: Autonomous Line-Following Robot
items.description: Engineered an autonomous line-tracking robot using Arduino UNO and L298N motor drivers. Developed C++ control logic to process inputs from TCRT5000 infrared sensors for real-time trajectory calculation and movement adjustments.

items.title: User Management Web Application
items.description: Developed a full-stack web application using Django, implementing secure user authentication, profile management, and dynamic form handling integrated with a SQL database.

items.title: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
items.description: Completed a comprehensive 8-course program by Google, covering fundamentals of network security, risk management, incident response, and hands-on practice with Linux, SQL, and SIEM tools.

items.title: P1 Startup Pitching Competition
items.description: Pitched an interactive game concept designed to promote Thai tourism through cultural experiences. Developed a comprehensive business model, conducted market analysis, and presented the strategy to a panel of judges.

Skill.section_desc: Technologies and tools I work with to build scalable solutions.

items.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering
items.description: Built a foundation in software engineering, computer architecture, and algorithm design. Applied theoretical knowledge to real-world scenarios through comprehensive projects involving full-stack web development, machine learning integration, and scalable system architecture.

Contact.section_desc: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question, a project in mind, or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
